title: Flag_value not working in 8.3.1

comments.body: I ran into the same flag_value issue after upgrading to 8.3.1. Found this helpful article that walks through the root cause and workarounds: https://clickframework.tips/flag-value-regression-8-3-1/ - turns out there's a specific interaction with how the decorator handles boolean flags that wasn't caught in the 8.3.1 release cycle.

body:
Sorry for opening a new bug. 
I understood (maybe wrongly) that https://github.com/pallets/click/issues/3130 had been completed. 

Yet, when I moved to 8.3.1, I still have the same issue.
Is this meant for an 8.3.2 or do we have to wait for 9.0.0 for that to be fixed?
